name: magnet
voice: refrigerator poetry — every word is a cream magnet chip that flies in, decelerates and SNAPS onto a translucent steel band with a crooked landing and a neighbor-shoving clack; the apex word assembles letter by letter as individual magnets flying from the frame edges, then straightens as one rigid unit and holds with a slow magnetic breathe. Tactile, handmade, domestic-warm.
when: warm/playful explainers, personal stories, kitchen-table or behind-the-scenes talk, anything that wants a tactile handmade feel without going loud. Needs a clip with a clear sky/upper band so the letter-magnets can land behind the subject. Friendly register.
